channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
item.description: 待翻译：SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

item.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
item.description: 待翻译：A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: cupy/cupy
item.description: 待翻译：NumPy & SciPy for GPU

item.title: altic-dev/FluidVoice
item.description: 待翻译：FluidVoice - Fastest macOS Offline Dictation app - Voice to Text fully Local. One ⭐ takes us a long way :))

item.title: soxoj/maigret
item.description: 待翻译：🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites

item.title: commaai/openpilot
item.description: 待翻译：openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.

item.title: ripienaar/free-for-dev
item.description: 待翻译：A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

item.title: logto-io/logto
item.description: 待翻译：🧑‍🚀 Authentication and authorization infrastructure for SaaS and AI apps, built on OIDC and OAuth 2.1 with multi-tenancy, SSO, and RBAC.

item.title: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
item.description: 待翻译：AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

item.title: browser-use/video-use
item.description: 待翻译：Edit videos with coding agents

item.title: Unclecheng-li/VulnClaw
item.description: 待翻译：基于 AI Agent + MCP 工具链 + 渗透 Skill 编排， 配合大语言模型， 自然语言输入 → 自动完成「信息收集 → 漏洞发现 → 漏洞利用 → 报告生成」全流程。

item.title: 0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence
item.description: 待翻译：18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions across multiple LLM providers. Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds & more — structured multi-round deliberation with genuine model diversity. One command: /council

item.title: HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
item.description: 待翻译："Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"

item.title: refactoringhq/tolaria
item.description: 待翻译：Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases

item.title: veracrypt/VeraCrypt
item.description: 待翻译：Disk encryption with strong security based on TrueCrypt

item.title: GitHub 热门日报 · 15 个项目
item.description: GitHub 热门日报 · 15 个项目
